name: @brainana/imaging-math
description: Pure, framework-free imaging math shared by brainana vis tools (ROI warp, volume→surface projection). No DOM/NiiVue — headless-testable.
//exports: Subpaths resolve to RAW .ts source (no build step), so Vite and Node >=22.18 type-stripping resolve identically. Keep the .ts extension in importers.
